title: Announcements

Announcements

Okan Homepage

Announcements

Snow Break

11
						January

2026

Due to the expected heavy snowfall and adverse weather conditions across Istanbul, education and training will be suspended for one day on Monday, January 12, 2026. Our campuses will be closed on this date.

All face-to-face exams scheduled for Monday, January 12 have been postponed to a later date.

Updated information regarding the new dates and times of the postponed face-to-face exams will be announced to our students in the coming days.
